name: Equal Trading, Inc.
summary: Equal Trading, Inc. provides foreign exchange trading services. It operates as an online retail trading platform provider, managed account service provider, market marker, and online trader for its own funds, as well as offers education and training services. The company, formerly known as Sportspublications.net, Inc., was incorporated in 2000 and changed its name to Equal Trading, Inc. in 2004. Equal Trading is based in Miami, Florida.
